detaileddescription.para: Id of diffusion solver, needed for coordinating numerics.

briefdescription.para: Pointer to diffusion solver.
Number of threads to use when parallel version of Gsolve is used.

detaileddescription.para: Each VoxelPools entry handles all the pools in a single voxel. Each entry knows how to update itself in order to complete the kinetic calculations for that voxel. The ksolver does multinode management by indexing only the subset of entries present on this node.

briefdescription.para: Offset * voxIdx is added to rng seed for each voxel to get indept.
First voxel indexed on the current node.
Utility ptr used to help Pool Id lookups by the Ksolve.
Flag: True if atot should be updated every clock tick.

memberdef.argsstring: (const size_t begin, const size_t end, ProcPtr p)
memberdef.name: advance_chunk

detaileddescription.para:
Here we fill in the dependencies involving incrementFuncs. These are the functions that evaluate an expression that specifies rate of change of # of a target molecule. There are two dependencies:
When a reaction fires, all the incrementFuncs that depend on the reactants must update their rates. This is added to sys_.dependency[] which is the usual handler for reac dependencies. Note that the inputs to the incrementFuncs are NOT present in the stoichiometry matrix, so this has to be done as a separate step.
When the incrementFunc fires, then downstream reacs must update their rates. This is handled by default with the regular dependency calculations, since incrementFuncs are treated like regular reactions.
Fill in dependency list for all MMEnzs on reactions. The dependencies of MMenz products are already in the system, so here we just need to add cases where any reaction product is the Enz of an MMEnz.
Here we fill in the dependencies involving poolFuncs. These are the functions that evaluate an expression and assign directly to the

sect1.title: of a target molecule.
sect1.para:
There are two dependencies:
When a reaction fires, all the Functions that depend on the reactants must update their target molecule. This is in sys_.dependentMathExpn[].
All the reactions that depend on the updated target molecules must now recompute their propensity. This, along with other reac dependencies, is in sys_.dependency[].

detaileddescription.para: Gets block of data. The first 4 entries are passed in on the 'values' vector: the start voxel, numVoxels, start pool#, numPools. These are followed by numVoxels * numPools of data values which are filled in by the function. We assert that the entire requested block is present in this KsolveBase. The block is organized as an array of arrays of voxels; values[pool#][voxel#]
Note that numVoxels and numPools are the number in the current block, not the upper limit of the block. So values.size() == 4 + numPools * numVoxels.

briefdescription.para: Flag: returns true if randomized round to integers is done.
Inherited from KsolveBase.
get initial conc of molecules in given pool and voxel. Bdry cond.
Diffusion constant: Only one per pool, voxel number is ignored.
Get # of molecules in given pool and voxel. Varies with time.
Number of voxels here. pools_.size() == getNumLocalVoxels.
Inherited.
Returns the vector of pool Num at the specified voxel.
Return pool index, using Stoich ptr to do lookup.

detaileddescription.para: Get rate const in a given reac and voxel. Usually fixed but may vary if the reac is controlled by a function.

briefdescription.para: Flag: returns true if randomized round to integers is done.
return rngSeedOffset used to give distinct rand seeds to each voxel
Return volume of pool e.

detaileddescription.para: Inserts reactions that depend on molecules modified by the specified MathExpn, into the dependency list. Later.

inbodydescription.para: STL stuff follows, with the usual weirdness.

briefdescription.para: Return a pointer to the specified VoxelPool.

memberdef.argsstring: (const size_t begin, const size_t end, ProcPtr p)
memberdef.name: recalcTimeChunk

detaileddescription.para: Sets block of data. The first 4 entries on the 'values' vector are the start voxel, numVoxels, start pool#, numPools. These are followed by numVoxels * numPools of data values.

briefdescription.para: Flag: set true if randomized round to integers is to be done.
Assigns compartment.
Set initial conc of molecules in given pool and voxel. Bdry cond.
Diffusion constant: Only one per pool, voxel number is ignored.

detaileddescription.para: Inherited. Needed for reac-diff calculations so the Gsolve can orchestrate the data transfer between the itself and the diffusion solver.

briefdescription.para: Set # of molecules in given pool and voxel. Varies with time.

detaileddescription.para: Assigns the number of voxels used in the entire reac-diff system. Note that fewer than this may be used on any given node.
Assigns number of different pools (chemical species) present in each voxel.

briefdescription.para: Inherited.
Flag: set true if randomized round to integers is to be done.
assign rngSeedOffset used to give distinct rand seeds to each voxel

detaileddescription.para: Informs the ZPI about the stoich, used during subsequent computations. Called to wrap up the model building. The Stoich does this call after it has set up its own path.
Rescale specified voxel rate term following rate constant change or volume change. If index == ~0U then does all terms.
Handles request to change volumes of voxels in this Ksolve, and all cascading effects of this. At this point it won't handle change in size of voxel array.

briefdescription.para: Inherited.
